hints.text: Autonomous region of Portugal → Portuguese infra (poles, chevrons); very **mountainous, semi-tropical** island w/ **eucalyptus** forests (Azores = less mountainous, no eucalyptus)
**African lilies** (Agapanthus, white/blue round clusters) very common; hydrangeas & ferns too
**Terrace farming** everywhere (no flat land), plateaus split by stone walls
Houses white/grey/**pastel** w/ well-kept **red tile roofs**; white concrete-block barriers along roads
Unique small **stone bollards w/ a red reflector** (cuboid or cylindrical)
**Bus-stop signs** in a black/white/yellow scheme; taxis yellow w/ a blue stripe; yellow-&-black mountain guardrails
'**Shitcam**' (official Ari): wide circular blur, gloomy tone, often an unblurred **white car back**; low cloud/fog + tunnels very common
Banana plantations in the **south**; misty central-west **plateau** w/ wind turbines; **arid eastern tip** w/ little vegetation
